heroSummary: A five-level model of SQL proficiency measured across seven cross-cutting dimensions, from basic querying to enterprise data architecture.
frameworkIntro: This framework defines SQL competence as measurable growth across seven dimensions that each capture a distinct aspect of effective database work.
Every practitioner — from someone writing their first SELECT to someone designing enterprise-scale data architectures — operates across all seven dimensions simultaneously.
dimensionsIntro: Each dimension is independent: a practitioner can be strong in Query Construction but weak in Collaboration & Standards.
levelsIntro: Each level represents a recognizable, observable mode of working with SQL. Movement between levels is a shift in how all seven dimensions are engaged together.
howToUseThisFramework: Use the Self-Assessment to score yourself across all seven dimensions. Use the Competency Matrix to compare your weakest dimensions against your strongest.
Use the level detail pages for graduation criteria and evaluation tasks. Use the Study Guide to generate a prioritized reading list.
purpose: This framework provides a common vocabulary for discussing SQL proficiency and a structured path for skill development.
It is a reference for self-assessment and guided learning, not a certification or a test.
whatThisIs: This is a maturity model — a structured ladder that describes observable behaviors, core skills, and knowledge at each stage of SQL proficiency.
The seven dimensions define what competence means. The five levels define how much of it you have.

levelSummaries.title: Query Writer
levelSummaries.summary: Reads data using basic SELECT, WHERE, and ORDER BY.

levelSummaries.title: Data Analyst
levelSummaries.summary: Constructs multi-table JOINs, aggregations, and window functions.

levelSummaries.title: Schema Designer
levelSummaries.summary: Designs normalized schemas, manages transactions and constraints.

levelSummaries.title: Performance Engineer
levelSummaries.summary: Designs index strategies, optimizes queries, manages concurrency.

levelSummaries.title: Database Architect
levelSummaries.summary: Architects enterprise data systems, governance, and organizational strategy.
